scripts.postinstall: node -e "const { existsSync } = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const p = path.join(process.cwd(), 'node_modules', '.prisma', 'client'); if (existsSync(path.join(p, 'query_engine-windows.dll.node')) || existsSync(path.join(p, 'libquery_engine-rhel-openssl-3.0.x.so.node')) || existsSync(path.join(p, 'libquery_engine-debian-openssl-3.0.x.so.node'))) process.exit(0); require('child_process').execSync('npx prisma generate', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
